_comment: System properties for x_1432922_auto_j_0. Set in ServiceNow: System Properties > search x_1432922_auto_j_0. Never hardcode API keys in source code.

properties.name: x_1432922_auto_j_0.adzuna_app_id
properties.description: Adzuna App ID — register free at developer.adzuna.com (250 calls/day)

properties.name: x_1432922_auto_j_0.min_ats_score
properties.description: Minimum ATS score (%) to auto-apply. Range: 0-100.

properties.name: x_1432922_auto_j_0.follow_up_days
properties.description: Days after applying before a follow-up reminder fires.

properties.name: x_1432922_auto_j_0.notification_email
properties.description: Email address for follow-up reminders. Set to your email — never commit this value.

properties.name: x_1432922_auto_j_0.search_keywords
properties.description: Keywords for the scheduled job scanner.

properties.name: x_1432922_auto_j_0.search_location
properties.description: Location filter for job searches (e.g. 'Dallas TX'). Blank = remote/any.
